notes: Country-level VIZA RAG seed for turkey. This file is the source of truth for this country's visitor/tourism visa knowledge and is designed to evolve alongside the country-specific form-filling workflow.

documents.title: Turkiye Official e-Visa for Tourism and Commerce

chunks.title: Chinese passport tourism route for Turkey/Turkiye
chunks.content: For Chinese ordinary passport holders planning short tourism travel to Turkey/Turkiye, VIZA AI should consider the official Turkey e-Visa route for tourism or commerce when eligible. First confirm nationality, residence, purpose, stay length, supporting visa/residence documents if relevant, and whether the activity is tourism or commerce only. Work, study and residence require consular routing rather than tourist e-Visa. Keep advice limited to tourism/visitor travel unless the user states work, study, residence, immigration, journalism, volunteering or another regulated purpose.

chunks.title: Turkiye e-Visa official portal rules
chunks.content: Turkiye MFA states that www.evisa.gov.tr is the government portal run by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs. e-Visa applications can be created online for individuals, families or groups, and each traveller, including infants and children, must obtain a separate e-Visa. The official e-Visa is valid only for touristic and trade purposes. Travellers should carry a passport or travel document with validity at least 60 days beyond the permitted stay or visa/visa-exemption duration.

chunks.title: Turkiye non-tourism routes
chunks.content: If the user wants to work, study, reside, conduct paid activity, or stay beyond the short visitor route, do not recommend the e-Visa as final. Turkiye MFA guidance says visas for purposes other than tourism or commerce are issued by Turkish Embassies or Consulates. Ask follow-up questions when the purpose is ambiguous.

documents.title: Turkiye Application Form and Document Intake Requirements

chunks.title: Turkiye application channel and form scope
chunks.content: Turkiye official e-Visa portal Official source URLs reviewed for this seed: https://www.evisa.gov.tr/tour/. This RAG chunk is for visitor/tourism-oriented intake and form-filling preparation; route work, study, residence, immigration, journalism or other regulated purposes to a separate country workflow.

chunks.title: Turkiye fields to collect before filling the form
chunks.content: identity, passport/travel document, nationality, travel dates, email/contact and tourism/commerce purpose

chunks.title: Turkiye supporting documents and review checklist
chunks.content: passport/travel document meeting validity rules, payment method and any supporting visa/residence document required by eligibility rules Workflow guardrails: VIZA should separate eligibility check, form filling, document upload, payment and post-approval travel/entry checks. Do not guarantee entry; border authorities make the final decision.

chunks.title: Standard passport identity-field answer rules
chunks.content: Standard-answer identity fields must be answered from the applicant's passport biodata page, MRZ, official identity document, or the official dropdown options. This applies to passport number, name, date of birth, sex, nationality, issuing country, issue date, expiry date, issuing authority, place of issue, and passport/document type. For issuing authority or place-of-issue questions, do not infer the answer from the pickup city, residence city, application country, or travel destination; copy the exact Authority / Issuing authority / Place of issue wording printed on the passport if present. For Chinese ordinary passports, newer valid passports may show National Immigration Administration, PRC / 中华人民共和国国家移民管理局; older valid passports may show MPS Exit & Entry Administration / 公安部出入境管理局. If the passport prints a different authority, use the passport text. For passport type, select Ordinary / Regular / Normal only for ordinary personal passports; select Diplomatic, Official, Service, Special, Travel document, Refugee, or Other only when the document explicitly indicates that type. Official sources reviewed for this standard field rule include China National Immigration Administration certificate-issuing-authority notices and the Passport Law of the People's Republic of China; the passport biodata page remains the final source for the applicant's individual answer.

chunks.title: Official-source field answer norms
chunks.content:
Official-source field answer norms for turkey.
Use these norms only as filling guidance; if a live official form, passport, or uploaded document shows a more specific value, that document controls the answer.

Crawled source URLs: https://www.evisa.gov.tr/tour/

Passport and identity fields:
- You can check if you are eligible for e-Visa by clicking “Main Page > Apply” and selecting your country/region of travel document.
- In accordance with the article 7.1b of “the Law on Foreigners and International Protection” no.6458, foreigners wishing to enter Türkiye must carry a passport or a travel document as a substitute for passport with an expiration date at least 60 days beyond the “duration of stay” of their visa, e-Visa, visa exemption, or residence permit.
- You will be informed of these requirements after you select your country of travel document and travel dates.

Issue, expiry, and validity fields:
- e-Visa is valid for touristic and trade purposes only.
- In accordance with the article 7.1b of “the Law on Foreigners and International Protection” no.6458, foreigners wishing to enter Türkiye must carry a passport or a travel document as a substitute for passport with an expiration date at least 60 days beyond the “duration of stay” of their visa, e-Visa, visa exemption, or residence permit.
- The validity period of your e-Visa is different than the duration of stay.

Travel plan and port fields:
- Passport control officers at the ports of entry can verify your e-Visa in their system.

Accommodation, host, and address fields:
- After you receive the “e-mail address verification message” within an hour, you must click the “approve” button and proceed with the payment within 48 hours.

Answering rule: for closed-list fields, prefer the exact official option label/value. For document-backed fields, copy the passport, official identity document, application account, itinerary, invitation, accommodation, insurance, funds, or uploaded support document rather than guessing from a city, country, or prior answer.
